name: example-mcp-dashbuilder
description: AI-powered Kibana dashboard creation via MCP — create, preview, and export ES|QL visualizations through natural language.
long_description: An MCP App that lets AI assistants build Kibana dashboards through natural language conversation. Powered by ES|QL and Elastic Charts, it connects to Elasticsearch, explores your data, creates interactive visualizations (bar, line, area, pie, metric, heatmap), and renders live dashboard previews directly in the chat. Dashboards can be exported to Kibana as real Lens visualizations or imported from Kibana for AI-assisted editing.

tools.name: create_dashboard
tools.description: Create a new empty dashboard and make it the active one

tools.name: create_chart
tools.description: Create a chart visualization (bar, line, area, pie) and add it to the dashboard

tools.name: create_metric
tools.description: Create a metric visualization with an optional sparkline trend

tools.name: create_heatmap
tools.description: Create a heatmap visualization and add it to the dashboard

tools.name: create_section
tools.description: Create a collapsible section (row group) on the dashboard

tools.name: run_esql
tools.description: Execute an ES|QL query against Elasticsearch and return the results

tools.name: list_indices
tools.description: List available Elasticsearch indices matching a pattern

tools.name: get_fields
tools.description: Get field mappings for an index

tools.name: view_dashboard
tools.description: Display the live dashboard preview inline in the chat

tools.name: export_to_kibana
tools.description: Export the dashboard to Kibana as Lens visualizations

tools.name: import_from_kibana
tools.description: Import an existing Kibana dashboard into the MCP app

tools.name: list_dashboards
tools.description: List all saved dashboards with their titles, IDs, and which one is active

tools.name: switch_dashboard
tools.description: Switch to a different dashboard by its ID

tools.name: delete_dashboard
tools.description: Delete a saved dashboard by its ID

tools.name: set_dashboard_title
tools.description: Set or update the dashboard title

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Get the dashboard configuration including all charts

tools.name: clear_dashboard
tools.description: Remove all charts and reset the dashboard to a blank state

tools.name: move_panel_to_section
tools.description: Move a panel into a collapsible section

tools.name: remove_section
tools.description: Remove a section from the dashboard

tools.name: remove_chart
tools.description: Remove a chart from the dashboard by its ID

tools.name: export_queries
tools.description: Export the dashboard in a shareable format

tools.name: export_chart_image
tools.description: Export a chart as a PNG image

es_api_key.title: Elasticsearch API Key
es_api_key.description: API key for authentication (alternative to username/password)

es_username.title: Username
es_username.description: Username for authentication (alternative to API key)
